summary: Verified School Pod Notes Sidebar feature. All backend tests pass (10/10). All frontend UI tests pass. Notes are properly school-scoped - Emory notes don't appear in Florida pod. Notes sidebar shows school name in header ('Notes · Emory University'). Create/edit/delete note operations work with auth headers.
critical_code_review_comments: CoachNotesSidebar.js correctly uses programId prop to determine school-scoped endpoints
Auth headers properly included in delete/edit/fetch operations (authHeaders() function)
Sidebar header shows 'Notes · {schoolName}' when programId is present (line 148-149)
seed_data_creation: Created test notes with TEST_SPN_ and UI_TEST_ prefixes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Pod Notes Sidebar feature complete. Notes are school-scoped via programId prop. Sidebar header shows school name. All CRUD operations work with auth. Flow: Dashboard -> Emma Chen -> Athlete Overview (12 schools list) -> Click Emory -> School Pod -> Click Notes button in action bar -> Notes Sidebar opens with school-scoped notes.

backend_api: test_01_school_pod_loads_emory - School pod endpoint returns Emory data ✓
test_02_create_school_scoped_note - POST creates note with programId ✓
test_03_note_appears_in_emory_pod - Created note visible in Emory pod ✓
test_04_note_NOT_in_florida_pod - School scoping verified (0 Emory notes in Florida) ✓
test_01_sidebar_creates_note_with_tag - Note created with Coach Note tag ✓
frontend_ui: School Pod page loads with data-testid='school-pod-page' ✓
Action bar (data-testid='coach-action-bar') visible with all buttons ✓
Create note via sidebar textarea and Save Note button works ✓
Created note appears in sidebar list ✓
Back button navigates to athlete overview (/support-pods/athlete_3) ✓
Schools list visible on athlete overview with 12 schools ✓
Click Emory navigates back to School Pod ✓
